title: chrysanthemum hololeucum
intro: Chrysanthemum hololeucum, also known as the white chrysanthemum, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum hololeucum include reducing fever, alleviating headaches and sore throats, and improving cardiovascular health. Chrysanthemum hololeucum is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in some herbal preparations, such as supplements and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties.
